goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt record artifact builder for cockpit patch audit receipt record authorities without durable writes, audit persistence, patch application, server/route mutation, or permit consumption.
scope_out: Do not write records, receipts, or audits; do not perform durable writes, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit audit receipt record authority artifacts can produce an in-memory record artifact.
Recorded-at ref and audit receipt record evidence ref are required.
Audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and executable actions remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit receipt record persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Durable record write, receipt write, audit persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-187 authorized cockpit audit receipt record artifacts without recording them.
